---
name: Documentation task
about: Request documentation updates or additions
labels: [documentation]
---

## Documentation objective
What should be clarified, added, or corrected?

## Target audience
Who needs this documentation? (contributors, maintainers, users)

## Affected files/sections
List current files or pages if known.

## Required updates
- [ ] Content accuracy updates
- [ ] New content
- [ ] Structural/navigation improvements
- [ ] Examples/commands

## Definition of done
Describe what “complete” looks like.

## References
Link related issues, PRs, or external references.
